✅ Daily Checklist
MARK EACH ITEM PASS OR FAIL
Check for water leaks — notify manager if found
🔧 Work Order will be auto-created
Check all cages — cull any injured or sick birds
🔧 Work Order will be auto-created
All dead birds placed in white chute (back of barn, top floor)
White chute checked — getting full?
🔧 Work Order will be auto-created
Damaged cages & egg belts — any damage found?
🔧 Work Order will be auto-created
Water tubes cleaned (front & back of house)
🔧 Work Order will be auto-created
Dust & dander blown off — ceiling, walls, cages & fan screens (top & bottom)
All aisles blown out on bottom floor (under cages & egg collectors)
Front & back of egg collectors blown off
Egg spills cleaned up after egg collector run
Wheelbarrow emptied behind manure belts — NOT on pit belt
All tools returned to designated spots
Designated hallways cleaned (swept & tidied)
Back of house cleaned — dusting, sweeping & general cleanup
0 / 14 reviewed
